title: dryopteris polypodiformis
intro: Dryopteris polypodiformis is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, commonly known as the autumn fern. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris polypodiformis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving cardiovascular health and immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
